SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWENSON, TANNER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, RICHARD $2,054.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,189.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,054.02 FILED BY SWENSON, TANNER AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, RICHARD
